business.name: The Monal Islamabad
business.address: 5, Capital Enclave, Main Islamabad Expressway, near PWD Interchange, Islamabad, 44000, Pakistan
business.description: The Monal â Pakistan's premier restaurant chain offering authentic Pakistani cuisine with breathtaking views. Dine at our locations in Lahore, Rawalpindi, Murree, Peshawar, and Bhera. Experience world-class dining, event spaces, and unforgettable moments.

ai.tagline: Savor Authentic Pakistani Cuisine with Stunning Views
ai.hero_subtitle: Indulge in a culinary journey at The Monal, where exquisite flavors meet breathtaking scenery.
ai.about_paragraph: The Monal Islamabad is a premier dining destination renowned for its authentic Pakistani cuisine and exceptional service. Nestled in a picturesque location, our restaurant promises an unforgettable experience, whether you're enjoying a meal with family or celebrating a special occasion.
ai.about_story_left: The Monal Islamabad is a premier dining destination renowned for its authentic Pakistani cuisine and exceptional service. Nestled in a picturesque
ai.about_story_right: location, our restaurant promises an unforgettable experience, whether you're enjoying a meal with family or celebrating a special occasion.
ai.seo_title: The Monal Islamabad - Premier Pakistani Restaurant
ai.seo_description: Dine at The Monal Islamabad for exquisite Pakistani cuisine and stunning views. Reserve your table today!

features.title: Authentic Cuisine
features.description: Experience the rich flavors of traditional Pakistani dishes, expertly crafted by our talented chefs.

features.title: Event Spaces
features.description: Host your special occasions in our beautifully designed event spaces, perfect for any celebration.

features.title: Stunning Views
features.description: Enjoy breathtaking views of Islamabad while savoring your meal in our elevated dining area.

features.title: Diverse Menu
features.description: Our extensive menu features a wide variety of dishes, catering to every taste and preference.

features.title: Exceptional Service
features.description: Our attentive staff is dedicated to providing an unparalleled dining experience for every guest.

features.title: Family-Friendly
features.description: A welcoming atmosphere for families, with special menus and activities for children.

features.title: Flexible Hours
features.description: Open daily with extended hours to accommodate your dining needs, from lunch to late-night meals.

features.title: Easy Reservations
features.description: Book your table effortlessly through our online reservation system for a hassle-free experience.

features.title: Takeout & Delivery
features.description: Enjoy your favorite dishes from The Monal at home with our convenient takeout and delivery options.

features.title: Cultural Ambiance
features.description: Immerse yourself in a culturally rich setting that reflects the heritage of Pakistan.

reviews.text: "Had a great experience at Monal. Food was tasty, service was quick, and the view made the atmosphere special. Recommended!"

Definitely, Monal was on the top list to dine out with beautiful scenery in capital Islamabad.
Adventurer road, awesome service, good food worth the money.
I've been there 3 times, very much satisfied with food and services.
Will be missed. the restaurant is closed in 2025.

Memorable experience. Food quality and taste is top notch. Not very value for money 😔💰. Too much expensive. But experience and view is everything. Food spice levels and sugar and salt levels are very balanced. Very tasty food.   Every bite the taste is top notch and more than expected.  Always jam packed. Always wait for seat reservations. Standards and customer care are top priorities.
